headline: Corpay Sports Partnerships Support Cross Border Growth And Valuation Story
summary: Corpay (NYSE:CPAY) Cross-Border has been named Official Foreign Exchange Supplier to Toulouse Football Club. The company has also extended its existing alliance with AC Milan, continuing its role as a partner in foreign exchange and cross border payment services. These agreements add to Corpay's presence in European professional football and broaden visibility for its Cross-Border business. For investors watching Corpay, the new Toulouse Football Club agreement and the extended AC Milan...
